description_long: This house features a dramatic, dark exterior with steeply pitched roofs and ornate gables, reminiscent of classic haunted mansions. The structure is symmetrical, with two prominent side towers and a central tower, each topped with decorative spires and finials. Large, arched windows with glowing yellow light suggest an inhabited interior, while the central entrance is marked by a double door and a small overhang. The roofline is complex, with multiple dormers, chimneys, and intricate trim details. The facade is adorned with subtle architectural flourishes, including cross-shaped finials and a central circular window above the main entrance. The overall appearance is imposing and mysterious, evoking a sense of historical grandeur and gothic charm.
description: A grand, dark-colored house with steep roofs, ornate towers, and glowing arched windows, evoking a gothic, haunted mansion style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical facade, central entrance with double doors, and three prominent towers with glowing windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the structure, multiple roof levels, and large arched windows along the side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, additional windows, and the continuation of the ornate roofline and towers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing the extended side wing, more arched windows, and the intricate roof and dormer arrangement.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large arched windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central double door with small overhang, flanked by large windows and decorative trim
